channel.title: NYT > Technology
channel.description: Technology industry news, commentary, and analysis, with reporting on big tech, startups, and internet culture. The New York Times is a hub for conversation about news and ideas.

item.title: Wary of U.S., Carney Bets on AI Strategy for Canada
item.description: The country on Thursday released a national artificial intelligence strategy that focuses on building its sovereign capability and protecting consumers.
item.dc:creator: Vjosa Isai

media:content.media:credit: Chris Young/The Canadian Press, via Associated Press
media:content.media:description: Prime Minister Mark Carney of Canada during a demonstration at a Toronto hospital on Thursday. “Canadian A.I. adoption will be prudent, pragmatic and pro-worker,” he said.
